title: Pedagogy of the Oppressed
rationale: Chosen as the foundational Book #1 for philosophy-and-history-of-education: no other single text defines the entire subcategory. Originally published in Portuguese (Pedagogia do Oprimido) in 1968, first English translation 1970. The 50th Anniversary Edition (Bloomsbury Academic, 2018) with foreword by Donaldo Macedo is the most authoritative modern edition. NOTE: User specified ISBN 9781501314138; the actual ISBN for the 2018 paperback is 978-1501314131 (or 978-1501314148 for hardcover). All digits valid per search results from Bloomsbury.com, Amazon, AbeBooks confirming ISBN-13 9781501314131 for the 2018 Bloomsbury Academic 50th Anniversary Edition.
